adtm_bookdate.text: วันที่หนังสือ

as_bookno.text: เลขที่หนังสือ

as_manname.text: ชื่อผู้รับรอง

root.sql:
/*ยังไม่มี table sc_rep_certificate*/ SELECT sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.address, '!as_bookno_1!' as as_bookno, sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode, sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name, '!adtm_bookdate_1!' as adtm_bookdate, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, '!as_manname_1!' as as_manname, '!as_position_1!' as as_position, '!sponsor_1!' as sponsor
-- ,( case data_group when 'SHR' then 'ทุนเรือนหุ้น' when 'DEP' then 'เงินฝาก' when 'LON' then 'เงินกู้' else data_group end ) as c_text -- ,( case data_group when 'SHR' then '' when 'DEP' then trim( dep_name ) when 'LON' then trim( loan_name ) else data_group end ) as c_type -- ,( case data_group when 'SHR' then '' when 'DEP' then 'เลขที่ ' ||pka_com_function.fp_form( data_refno , 'XX-XXXXXXXXX' ) when 'LON' then 'เลขที่ ' || pka_com_function.fp_form( data_refno , 'XX-XXXXXXXXX' ) else data_refno end ) as c_doc_no
--,sc_rep_certificate.certificate_date, --sc_rep_certificate.data_group, --sc_rep_certificate.data_type, --sc_rep_certificate.data_balance, --sc_rep_certificate.data_refno , --sc_rep_certificate.data_monthly
--, decode( sc_rep_certificate.data_group , 'DEP' , ( SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name -- FROM sc_dep_m_rule -- WHERE sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_rep_certificate.data_type ) ) as dep_name -- --, decode( sc_rep_certificate.data_group , 'LON' , ( SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description -- FROM sc_lon_m_rule -- WHERE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_rep_certificate.data_type ) ) as loan_name -- --, decode( sc_rep_certificate.data_group , 'LON' , FPB_CAL_INT_CERTIFICATE( sc_rep_certificate.data_refno ) , 0 ) as est_int
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group -- , sc_rep_certificate WHERE ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_rep_certificate.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/
